message:
feat(raptorq): add math tooltips, refactor jargon system, and improve visualizations

- Add RaptorQMathTooltip component for interactive math expression explanations
- Add RaptorQTooltipShell shared tooltip UI component
- Extend M and MBlock KaTeX helpers with optional explanation prop
- Refactor raptorq-jargon.tsx to use shared tooltip shell
- Reorganize jargon definitions in lib/raptorq-jargon.ts
- Clean up visualization component styling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

We are solving Ax = b over GF(2). In this field, addition is XOR. In the real RFC 6330 scheme, most work stays XOR-cheap, but a small "insurance" component uses GF(256) to improve rank.
